items.name: yellow_potion
items.description: A potion made from grinded Yellow Herbs that restores about 175 HP.

items.name: yellow_herb
items.description: A valuable medicinal herb which efficiently heals wounds.

items.name: red_herb
items.description: A weak medicinal herb which heals wounds.

items.name: blue_potion
items.description: A potion made from grinded Blue Herbs that restores about 60 SP.

items.name: green_potion
items.description: A potion which cures Poison, Silence, Blind and Chaos effects.

items.name: white_potion
items.description: A potion made from grinded White Herbs that restores about 325 HP.

items.name: orange_potion
items.description: A potion made from grinded Red and Yellow Herbs that restores about 105 HP.

items.name: red_potion
items.description: A potion made from grinded Red Herbs that restores about 45 HP.

items.name: white_herb
items.description: A valuable medicinal herb which greatly heals wounds.

items.name: blue_herb
items.description: A very valuable medicinal herb whose unique aroma gratifies one's spirit.

items.name: green_herb
items.description: A valuable medicinal herb which counteracts the effects of poison.

items.name: banana
items.description: A sweet tasting tropical fruit made famous by its use in slapstick comedy and practical jokes.

items.name: apple
items.description: A round, edible fruit that, when eaten once a day, keeps the doctor away.

items.name: grape
items.description: Clustered berries with smooth skin that can be fermented to make wine.

items.name: carrot
items.description: An orange root that is supposedly good for your vision. Despite the Beta Carotene, kids don't care much for it.

items.name: hinalle_leaflet
items.description: Leaf cut from a Hinalle Plant which has a cool, fresh scent. It can ease pain and reinvigorate.

items.name: honey
items.description: A sweet product made by bees that is endowed with yummy flavor and medicinal uses.

items.name: aloe_leaflet
items.description: Leaf cut from an Aloe plant.

items.name: mastela_fruit
items.description: A shiny, purple fruit picked from the boughs of the Mastela tree.

items.name: milk
items.description: Pasteurized and bottled cow milk that is chock full of bovine goodness.

items.name: meat
items.description: A leg of meat that's been cooked to near perfection.

items.name: potato
items.description: A tuber that can be fried, baked, boiled mashed, even eaten.

items.name: holy_water
items.description: Blessed water used in sacred ceremonies.

items.name: panacea
items.description: A mystic remedy for all illnesses.

items.name: royal_jelly
items.description: Highly nutritious jelly secreted from honeybees that they only feed to larvae and future queens.

items.name: monster_s_feed
items.description: Processed food that is normally fed to monsters.

items.name: candy
items.description: A confection of sugar, chocolate and other flavorings. Kids love it!

items.name: apple_juice
items.description: Bottled apple juice that's easy to digest.

items.name: candy_cane
items.description: A striped cane of peppermint candy. Sugar daddies love it!

items.name: banana_juice
items.description: Bottled banana juice that's easy to digest.

items.name: grape_juice
items.description: Bottled grape juice that's easy to digest.

items.name: carrot_juice
items.description: Bottled carrot juice that's easy to digest.

items.name: ice_cream
items.description: Deliciously frosty ice cream that can cause brain freeze if you eat too much too quickly.

items.name: pumpkin
items.description: A large orange fruit grown from a vine that's used in baking pies and a few other dishes.

items.name: pet_food
items.description: Sterilized food that has been fortified with vitamins and minerals. Some Cute Pets will feed on this.

items.name: well_baked_cookie
items.description: A warm, scrumptious cookie.

items.name: piece_of_cake
items.description: A sweet slice of cake covered in icing and topped with a cherry.

items.name: raw_fish
items.description: A raw, fresh fish.

items.name: condensed_red_potion
items.description: A condensed red potion.

items.name: condensed_yellow_potion
items.description: A condensed yellow potion.

items.name: condensed_white_potion
items.description: A condensed white potion that weighs significantly less.

items.name: cheese
items.description: A palatable food with a unique scent that restores a small amount of SP.

items.name: yam
items.description: A kind of plant root used as food that restores a great amount of HP. It's advised to eat this slowly with water, or to bake it beforehand.

items.name: sushi
items.description: An Eastern delicacy, in which various types of raw fish is placed on top of rice. The rice is marinated in vinegar then wrapped in dried seaweed.

items.name: rice_cake
items.description: A snack made out of rice that doesn't contain any fat. Some women love having this snack.

items.name: bao
items.description: A type of dough that is filled with grinded meat, usually served hot. People living in eastern countries have enjoyed eating this food for a long time.

items.name: mochi
items.description: A tasty rice cake made for celebrating the Lunar New Year.

items.name: traditional_rice_cake
items.description: A type of food that is made of rice powder. There are many recipes to make this food, all of them absolutely delicious.

items.name: hand_made_chocolate
items.description: A collection of chocolates that are gathered and arranged to make a beautiful item. This is often used in courtship, and sometimes even used effectively.

items.name: chocolate
items.description: Fried and grinded Cacao that is solidified with Milk and cacao paste. Delicious and bittersweet.

items.name: handmade_white_chocolate
items.description: White chocolate which is used to propose to a girl by a boy during White Day.

items.name: white_chocolate
items.description: A white cacao.

items.name: rice_ball
items.description: A lump of rice which can be eaten for lunch.

items.name: shrimp
items.description: A shellfish which has a long tail and many legs. When cooked, the color of body changes into red and its flesh is very tasty with a unique scent.

items.name: tom_yum_goong
items.description: A type of soup wich is regarded as one of the three famous soups in the world. It has a spicy, sweet and sour taste with shrimps, lemons and chilees.

items.name: lucky_candy_cane
items.description: A candy cane which is rumored to bring luck to whoever eats it.

items.name: lemon
items.description: A bright yellow fruit with very sour juice and a fresh scent.

items.name: lucky_candy
items.description: Candy which is rumored to bring luck to whoever eats it.

items.name: lucky_cookie
items.description: A cookie which is rumored to bring luck to whomever eats it.

items.name: novice_potion
items.description: An exclusive red potion for Novices!

items.name: chocolate_drink
items.description: A kind of drink made from chocolate and milk from one of the Royal Court Dessert Specialist's recipes. Although the Dessert Chef wishes for people to drink this treat elegantly, it's usually gulped down, enjoyed with hand sloppily placed on the waist.

items.name: bag_of_grain
items.description: Dried grains that are commonly used in the cuisines of many countries.

items.name: prickly_fruit
items.description: A freshly scented, thorny fruit from a tree that restores a small amount of HP and SP.

items.name: egg
items.description: An egg from a bird. It's full of nutrition, making it an ideal food for growing children.

items.name: strawberry
items.description: A red berry that is renown for its slightly sweet and sour taste, and is  best eaten fresh.

items.name: fresh_fish
items.description: A fresh fish that can be cooked in a variety of ways.

items.name: bread
items.description: Freshly leavened bread that gives off a wholesome scent.

items.name: edible_mushroom
items.description: An edible mushroom that can be eaten raw or cooked.

items.name: fish_cake_soup
items.description: A bowl filled with hot, hearty fish broth and a generous helping of fish cake.

items.name: orange
items.description: A sweet citrus fruit that can be eaten raw, juiced, or cooked as a jam.

items.name: red_prickly_fruit
items.description: A freshly scented, thorny fruit from a tree that restores a small amount of HP and SP.

items.name: honey_pancake
items.description: A very sweet pancake topped with honey.

items.name: caviar_pancake
items.description: A pancake topped with caviar. Average people have trouble telling the difference between fine caviar and common frog spawn eggs.

items.name: jam_pancake
items.description: A pancake topped with strawberry jam. This looks much more delicious than plain strawberries alone.

items.name: sour_cream_pancake
items.description: A pancake in which sour cream is one of the main ingredients. Biting into just once will make your eyeswater.

items.name: mushroom_pancake
items.description: A pancake made with mushrooms that has a light taste that everyone seems to like.

items.name: lovely_choco_tart
items.description: A tart covered in a smooth layer of rich chocolate that is the perfect dessert for romantic dinners.

items.name: cute_strawberry_choco
items.description: A strawberry that is supposed to be covered in a smooth layer of chocolate, but whoever made this botched it up. It's not perfect, but this was made with love, if not skill.

items.name: fly_wing
items.description: An enchanted fly's wing that instantly sends its user to a random spot when waved in the air.

items.name: butterfly_wing
items.description: An enchanted butterfly's wing that instantly sends its user to his Save Point when waved in the air.

items.name: dead_branch
items.description: A twig which contains the mysterious power of eternity. It can summon a living creature...

items.name: aloevera
items.description: A basic herbal emollient made from Aloe extract. Despite its stench and sour taste, it's addictive if regularly eaten.

items.name: old_blue_box
items.description: A mysterious blue box that seems to hold something inside, but you'll have to open it to find out.

items.name: yggdrasilberry
items.description: Fruit from the Yggdrasil tree which brings life to our world. Its fantastic taste is full of life.

items.name: yggdrasil_seed
items.description: Seed from the Yggdrasil tree which holds our world together. It has a weird, energizing pungence.

items.name: anodyne
items.description: A medicine made from grinded Mint that is used to ease pain and relax muscle tension. It's a popular painkiller because of its potency.

items.name: amulet
items.description: A forbidden talisman that can reanimate the dead, resulting in a walking corpse or undead zombie.

items.name: yggdrasil_leaf
items.description: Leaf from the Yggdrasil tree which maintains the mortal coil. It can bring life to fallen characters.

items.name: magnifier
items.description: A magnifying glass used for scrutinizing objects.

items.name: mini_furnace
items.description: A disposable, miniature blast furnace that can be easily carried. Used to manufacture metals.

items.name: iron_hammer
items.description: A disposable hammer made out of well-tempered steel. Necessary tool in crafting Level 1 Weapons.

items.name: old_card_album
items.description: An antique album in which the power of a mysterious Card item is contained...

items.name: oridecon_hammer
items.description: A disposable hammer made out of Oridecon. Necessary tool in crafting Level 3 Weapons.

items.name: golden_hammer
items.description: A disposable hammer made out of pure gold. Necessary tool in crafting Level 2 Weapons.

items.name: worn_out_scroll
items.description: A rolled up piece of parchment, now brittle with age, on which faded text can scarcely be read.

items.name: old_purple_box
items.description: An old purple box holding contents that are a mystery until it is opened.

items.name: unripe_apple
items.description: An apple that isn't ripe enough for humans to eat. Poring finds it to be very tasty.

items.name: orange_juice
items.description: A small bottle of orange juice. Drops finds it to be very tasty.

items.name: tree_root
items.description: Some roots from trees can be used as medicine, but most of them are fibrous enough to be used as rope.

items.name: scorpion_tail
items.description: A tail severed from a scorpion.

items.name: pointed_scale
items.description: A single scale from a Worm Tail monster.

items.name: daenggie
items.description: A braided pigtail that has been cut from the head of a young girl.

items.name: reptile_tongue
items.description: Merely a severed reptile's tongue.

items.name: stem
items.description: Some stems from plants can be used to in making certain medicines.

items.name: resin
items.description: A viscous plant substance used in the production of certain types of goods.

items.name: spawn
items.description: Frog eggs.

items.name: scell
items.description: A small crystallization created by some monsters.

items.name: jellopy
items.description: A small crystallization created by some monsters.

items.name: zargon
items.description: A small crystallization created by some monsters.

items.name: garlet
items.description: A small crystallization created by some monsters.

items.name: fluff
items.description: A clump of monster fur and fuzz that can be used to make thread and fabric.

items.name: tooth_of_bat
items.description: Farmiliar's sharpened tooth.

items.name: chrysalis
items.description: Skin from a larva that has been shed or peeled off.

items.name: talon
items.description: A sharp talon from a bird's foot.

items.name: feather_of_birds
items.description: A bird's feather that can be used in decor or in fabric creation.

items.name: sticky_webfoot
items.description: A webbed foot cut from a monster's hind leg.

items.name: animal_skin
items.description: Animal hide that can be used in making clothes, coverings or beddings.

items.name: mushroom_spore
items.description: A spore discharged from a mushroom.

items.name: wolf_claw
items.description: A claw severed from a wolf's paw.

items.name: evil_horn
items.description: Baphomet's horn is a symbol representing evil.

items.name: orc_s_fang
items.description: A cuspid wrenched out of from a gruesome Orc's jaw.

items.name: powder_of_butterfly
items.description: Butterfly wing powder that sparkles with the power of fantasy.

items.name: bill_of_birds
items.description: A bird's beak. Waste not want not.

items.name: insect_feeler
items.description: Antennae that serve as sense organs for insects.

items.name: immortal_heart
items.description: A heart which will never stop beating. It contains some sort of dreadful power.

items.name: rotten_bandage
items.description: Old, dirty bandage that's so soiled, it's almost worthless.

items.name: orcish_voucher
items.description: A small sculpture that serves as the token for every true Orc Warrior.

items.name: skel_bone
items.description: A bone taken from an Undead skeleton.

items.name: snake_scale
items.description: Scales from a snake that can be used to make some rather flamboyant clothes.

items.name: memento
items.description: A box that is buried with the dead. It contains gems and someone's mementos...

items.name: shell
items.description: A hard shell that used to protect a monster.

items.name: scale_shell
items.description: A shell-like piece of tough monster skin that is covered with hard scales.

items.name: venom_canine
items.description: A sharp, poisonous fang from a monster.

items.name: bee_sting
items.description: A stinger from a hornet or bee.

items.name: grasshopper_s_leg
items.description: A Rocker's hind leg.

items.name: sticky_mucus
items.description: Mysteriously sticky liquid.

items.name: horseshoe
items.description: A "U" shaped piece of iron fitted on a horse's hoof for its protection.

items.name: solid_shell
items.description: A solid, durable shell taken from a monster.

items.name: nose_ring
items.description: A ring placed in a cow's nose so that it can be steered more easily.

items.name: horn
items.description: Hard and sharp horn from a monster's head.

items.name: raccoon_leaf
items.description: A leaf that gives Smokies the power to change form and become invisible.

items.name: snail_s_shell
items.description: A hard, spiral shaped shell used by Snails.

items.name: yoyo_tail
items.description: A prehensile tail from a Yoyo.

items.name: bear_s_footskin
items.description: A lazy bear's foot that supposedly has a unique flavor and the power to restore male vigor.

items.name: heart_of_mermaid
items.description: The heart of a mermaid.

items.name: feather
items.description: A feather that boasts full, lustrous barbs used for making clothes of the highest quality.

items.name: cactus_needle
items.description: A sharp needle from a Muka cactus monster.

items.name: fin
items.description: A fish monster's fin.

items.name: gill
items.description: Part of a fish's breathing apparatus.

items.name: stone_heart
items.description: A heart constructed entirely out of stone.

items.name: shining_scale
items.description: A shimmering, reflective scale.

items.name: insect_peeling
items.description: Shed skin from worms and insects.

items.name: stinky_scale
items.description: A nasty scale with a horribly offensive odor.

items.name: decayed_nail
items.description: A putrid, incredibly pungent corpse's nail.

items.name: nipper
items.description: A crustacean's claw.

items.name: horrendous_mouth
items.description: A complete set of corpse's teeth. Well, as complete as it can get.

items.name: tentacle
items.description: A flexible, prehensile and boneless appendage.

items.name: conch
items.description: The shell of a marine mollusk.

items.name: sharp_scale
items.description: A scale that is much sharper than a razor.

items.name: clam_flesh
items.description: Muscular and fatty clam tissue that can be cooked in all sorts of ways.

items.name: clam_shell
items.description: A hard shell taken from a dead clam.

items.name: crab_shell
items.description: A hard crab shell that smells horrible.

items.name: turtle_shell
items.description: A hard shell that obviously failed to protect a turtle.

items.name: gold
items.description: A valuable metal in bullion form. It's used to make coins, jewelry and gaudy false teeth.

items.name: heroic_emblem
items.description: An emblem given to an Orc Warrior that is proof of his heroism.

items.name: alcohol
items.description: This colorless liquid is the secret behind the addictiveness of beers and wine. 200 Proof.

items.name: detrimindexta
items.description: A liquid with unique scientific properties. It's difficult to mix in water and is normally diluted in a solution.

items.name: karvodailnirol
items.description: A liquid with interesting characteristics and many possible applications.

items.name: mixture
items.description: A special compound that has applications that can only be understood by keen minds schooled in science.

items.name: counteragent
items.description: A mixture of chemical substances that can only be produced by geniuses.

items.name: scarlet_dyestuffs
items.description: Red colored dye that is made from grinded Red Herbs.

items.name: lemon_dyestuffs
items.description: Yellow colored dye that is made out of ground Yellow Herbs.

items.name: cobalt_blue_dyestuffs
items.description: Blue colored dye that is made from ground Blue Herbs.

items.name: green_dyestuffs
items.description: Green colored dye that is made out of ground Green Herbs.

items.name: orange_dyestuffs
items.description: Orange colored dye that was made from grinding Red and Yellow Herbs together.

items.name: black_dyestuffs
items.description: Black colored dye made from various grinded herbs.

items.name: elunium
items.description: A very light, non-toxic metal used for refining and toughening Armor.

items.name: oridecon
items.description: Pure Oridecon metal. Widely known as the Blessed Metal, it can increase the damage of weapons once welded to them. Used to temper Level 3 and 4 weapons.

items.name: white_dyestuffs
items.description: White colored dye that is made out of grinded White Herbs.

items.name: violet_dyestuffs
items.description: Purpled colored dye that is made by grinding Blue and Red Herbs.

items.name: anvil
items.description: A smithing tool on which heated metals are placed so that they can be shaped by hammering. Used in the making of common products.

items.name: emperium_anvil
items.description: An anvil, made of pure Emperium, that's used to manufacture products of the highest quality.

items.name: golden_anvil
items.description: An anvil, made of pure Gold, that's used in the manufacture of high quality products.

items.name: oridecon_anvil
items.description: An anvil, made of pure Oridecon, that's used to make quality goods.

items.name: crystal_blue
items.description: A sky colored ore that glows with the light of the deep ocean depths. Possesses the Water property and forms the enchanted stone, Mystic Frozen, when refined.

items.name: red_blood
items.description: A vivid red ore that glows from inside with an orange yellow light. Possesses the Fire property and can form the enchanted stone, Flame Heart, when refined.

items.name: wind_of_verdure
items.description: A lemon colored ore that contains a pale, greenish light. Possesses the Wind property and forms the enchanted stone, Rough Wind, when refined.

items.name: green_live
items.description: A blue-green ore imbued with a faint, mesmerizing light. Possesses the Earth property and forms the enchanted stone, Great Nature, when refined.

items.name: flame_heart
items.description: A dark red, heart shaped stone enchanted with the Fire property.

items.name: great_nature
items.description: A citrus colored, bud shaped stone enchanted with the Earth property.

items.name: rough_wind
items.description: A pale green, lightning bolt shaped stone imbued with the Wind property.

items.name: star_crumb
items.description: A small stellar crystal, fallen from the heavens, which can be used to craft strengthened weapons.

items.name: steel
items.description: An iron and carbon alloy known for its structural durability and usually used in the crafting of high-quality arms.

items.name: iron
items.description: Malleable, silver-white metal that's very light weight and easy to temper. Commonly used to create arms and other goods.

items.name: star_dust
items.description: Stardust which can form a Star Crumb after being refined.

items.name: iron_ore
items.description: An impure ore that forms Iron after being refined.

items.name: coal
items.description: A black mineral substance that can form Steel once it is combined with Iron.

items.name: mystic_frozen
items.description: A light blue, crystal stone enchanted with the Water property.

items.name: hammer_of_blacksmith
items.description: A hammer for the Blacksmith class that is used for refining.

items.name: old_magicbook
items.description: A spell book containing powerful, ancient magic.

items.name: chivalry_emblem
items.description: A token which shows a knight's loyalty to his lord.

items.name: necklace_of_wisdom
items.description: A mysterious necklace that is rumored to possess the power of clairvoyance.

items.name: necklace_of_oblivion
items.description: A necklace given from a master once one earns the honor of joining the Assassin Guild.

items.name: hand_of_god
items.description: A figure of a hand that contains great religious symbolism.

items.name: phracon
items.description: A metal that can be used to strengthen and upgrade Level 1 Weapons.

items.name: emveretarcon
items.description: A metal that can be used to strengthen and upgrade Level 2 Weapons.

items.name: frill
items.description: Some skin from the neck of a lizard which lives in the desert.

items.name: mole_whiskers
items.description: Whiskers from a mole.

items.name: ant_jaw
items.description: A tough, sharp jaw from an ant.

items.name: rainbow_shell
items.description: A bug shell that reflects the colors of the rainbow.

items.name: rat_tail
items.description: A thin rat's tail.

items.name: mole_claw
items.description: A mole's claw that is sturdy enough to dig into the ground.

items.name: black_hair
items.description: Lustrous, well brushed hair cut from some virgin.

items.name: trunk
items.description: A woody stem from a tree that's useful for lumber.

items.name: dokebi_horn
items.description: Horns from a Dokebi which are rumored to bring great fortune to their owner.

items.name: fish_tail
items.description: A tail severed from a fish monster.

items.name: squid_ink
items.description: Bottled black fluid from Marse the squid that seems to have failed its purpose of providing self defense.

items.name: nine_tails
items.description: A set of tails that used to belong to a Nine Tail fox. But not anymore, apparently.

items.name: cobweb
items.description: A sticky spider's web made of surprisingly strong threadlike fibers.

items.name: acorn
items.description: A tough, woody shelled nut from an oak tree.

items.name: porcupine_quill
items.description: Sharp, hollow quills which used to cover and protect some porcupine.

items.name: tongue
items.description: A tongue cut from a Monster. It has a disgusting coating of sticky saliva.

items.name: tiger_skin
items.description: A tiger's hide that's soft, furry, nice and feral.

items.name: mantis_scythe
items.description: A sharp, front limb severed from a Mantis.

items.name: mane
items.description: Bristly, tough hair cut from a wild boar.

items.name: tiger_s_footskin
items.description: A tiger's paw that's widely known to the elderly as the King of Invigorators.

items.name: maneater_blossom
items.description: A carnivorous flower with a digestive system very much like the humans.

items.name: maneater_root
items.description: Roots, which resemble human legs, that almost look capable of walking.

items.name: blue_hair
items.description: Hair cut from a Kobold that appears bristly but is actually downy soft.

items.name: dragon_tail
items.description: A tail cut off from a dragon that, sadly, will never grow back.

items.name: little_evil_horn
items.description: Horns sliced off the head of a little demon.

items.name: little_evil_wing
items.description: Wings from a little demon which look like those of a small bat.

items.name: dragon_canine
items.description: A dragon's cuspid that is sharp enough to pierce through dragon scales.

items.name: dragon_scale
items.description: An iridescent dragon's scale that is tough enough to protect from weather and most forms of harm.

items.name: bug_leg
items.description: A hind leg that has been cut from a bug.

items.name: elder_pixie_s_moustache
items.description: A moustache shaved off an old dwarf that has somehow maintained its entire shape and form.

items.name: lantern
items.description: A carriable case with glass panes that allow some contained light to illuminate dark areas.

items.name: zenorc_s_fang
items.description: A cuspid pulled out of a cursed Orc's mouth.

items.name: scorpion_nipper
items.description: A sharp forelimb claw removed from a scorpion.

items.name: dead_medusa
items.description: A Medusa's head that, naturally, looks pretty sad and depressed.

items.name: cultish_masque
items.description: A ceremonial mask used by an ancient shaman.

items.name: orc_claw
items.description: A thick, sharpened fingernail from an Orc.

items.name: skirt_of_virgin
items.description: A traditional skirt that symbolizes virginity.

items.name: tendon
items.description: A bunch of tough, strong tendons.

items.name: horrendous_hair
items.description: Some of Medusa's hair, which is essentially just a bunch of snakes.

items.name: sword_3
items.description: A basic one-handed sword.

items.name: sword_4
items.description: A basic one-handed sword.

items.name: falchion_3
items.description: A one-handed sword with a rounded blade.

items.name: falchion_4
items.description: A one-handed sword with a rounded blade.

items.name: blade_3
items.description: A one-handed sword with a thick, flat blade.

items.name: blade_4
items.description: A one-handed sword with a thick, flat blade.

items.name: rapier_3
items.description: A one-handed sword with an elegant blade and crossguard.

items.name: rapier_2
items.description: A one-handed sword with an elegant blade and crossguard.

items.name: scimiter_2
items.description: A strong, swift one-handed sword with a curved blade.

items.name: scimiter_3
items.description: A strong, swift one-handed sword with a curved blade.

items.name: katana_3
items.description: A straight bladed sword that the Japanese samurai depended on during battle.

items.name: katana_4
items.description: A straight bladed sword that the Japanese samurai depended on during battle.
